name: Lamball
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield.
Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to
Ranch.
description:
A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down.
This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move,
making it easy to capture and kill.
As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom
of the food chain itself.
description_fr:
Tombe à la renverse naturellement lorsqu'il tente de gravir une pente.
Les vertiges l'empêchent également de bouger, ce qui le propulse tout en bas de la chaîne alimentaire.

name: Cattiva
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
At a glance it appears full of confidence, but it is in fact weak and cowardly.
Being toyed with by a
is in many ways the greatest of disgraces.
description_fr:
Son allure imposante cache en réalité un être peureux et faible.
Se faire lécher par constitue donc en quelque sorte l'humiliation suprême.

name: Chikipi
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes lays an Egg
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Extremely weak and far too delicious.
It is one of the weakest Pals alongside.
No matter how many are hunted, they just keep appearing.
description_fr:
Aussi frêle que délicieux, c'est l'un des Pals les plus faibles avec.
Peu importe combien en sont chassés, ils continuent d'apparaître.

name: Lifmunk
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, leaps onto the player's head and
uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.
description:
Intelligent as a five to seven-year-old human child.
It makes a wonderful partner, but there have been more than a few cases
where they've killed their master after learning to use weapons.
description_fr:
Son intelligence équivaut à celle d'un enfant humain de 5 à 7 ans.
Bien qu'il soit un excellent partenaire, certains individus ont toutefois appris à manier les armes pour les retourner contre leur maître.

name: Fuack
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, Fuack
body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
description:
Using its own body water, this Pal can create waves anywhere.
It body surfs when in a hurry, but the resulting speed often ends
in a fatal collision.
description_fr:
Peut créer des vagues à la demande grâce à l'eau qu'il produit.
Il utilise son propre corps comme planche de surf pour aller plus vite, mais les collisions fatales sont monnaie courante.

name: Fuack Ignis
partner_skill_desc: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
description:
With a belly built for friction, this Pal sparks flames as it body surfs.
But when it gets carried away, it often ends up a rolling fireball.
description_fr:
Son ventre à friction élevée lui permet de faire du body-surfing... au point de prendre feu.
Il finit régulièrement en torche vivante, emporté par son propre élan.

name: Vixy
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes digs up items from the ground
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
The idol of Palpagos Island.
If you bully a,
you best be prepared to become enemies with the whole world.
description_fr:
L'idole de Palpagos.
Chercher des noises à revient à se mettre le monde entier à dos.

name: Celaray
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider.
Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.
description:
Riding the wind, this Pal travels where it pleases.
Should it find a partner along the way,
the encounter will mark its journey's end.
description_fr:
Chevauche le vent et voyage au gré de ses envies.
Lorsqu’il trouve un partenaire au fil de sa route, son voyage s’achève.

name: Celaray Lux
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. 
Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.
description:
Its flashy patterns help it attract a partner.
But after a long history of electrocution incidents involving,
yellow-and-black stripes are now seen across the island as a sign of danger.
description_fr:
Ses motifs tape-à-l'œil l'aident à trouver un partenaire.
Mais les nombreux accidents causés par ses chocs électriques ont fini par faire du motif rayé jaune et noir un symbole de danger sur l'île.

name: Cremis
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals.
Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Compared to, it has finer wool
and a temperament more suited for domestication.
However, it has historically always been kept as a pet.
Cuteness is considered a virtue.
description_fr:
Comparé à, sa laine est plus fine et son tempérament mieux adapté à la domestication.
Il a pourtant toujours été élevé comme un simple animal de compagnie.
Le mignon l’emporte sur tout.

name: Croajiro
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy.
Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.
description:
Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life.
By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch,
they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.
description_fr:
Quiconque commet une faute au sein du groupe sera sommé de se donner la mort.
En perçant son sac vocal gonflé à l’extrême avec une branche, il sera propulsé au-delà de l’atmosphère, vers l’au-delà.

name: Croajiro Noct
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy.
Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.
While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.
description:
The who have forsaken their honor gather and form splinter groups.
They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey.
If you encounter a pack of in the dead of the night,
it's your life that's on the line.
description_fr:
Des individus ayant perdu tout sens de l'honneur.
 utilisera tous les moyens existants pour tuer sa proie.
Mais tomber sur un groupe de à la nuit tombée
inversera les rôles.

name: Herbil
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Herbil uses its healing powers to revive 
the player when incapacitated.
description:
When in doubt, punch it till it works—that’s 's approach to fixing things.
With strength perfectly tuned for humans, sometimes just one punch is enough to restart a stopped heart.
description_fr:
Est convaincu que frapper un objet cassé peut suffire à le réparer.
Heureusement, la force de est parfaitement dosée pour les humains.
Un simple coup peut même faire repartir un cœur arrêté... comme par miracle.

name: Teafant
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, spouts mysterious water that
soothes wounds and restores the player's Health.
description:
Large amounts of water pour from what is thought to be its nose,
though some say that it is, in fact, just snot.
This has sparked a fierce debate among Pal scholars.
description_fr:
Une grande quantité d'eau s'écoule de ce qui semble être sa trompe, mais il ne s'agirait là que de mucus nasal.
Des discussions animées occupent ainsi les chercheurs.

name: Gumoss
partner_skill_desc: While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.
description:
A strange Pal with a body resembling tree sap.
It gradually loses strength if it has nothing to cover
its body with, eventually rotting away.
description_fr:
Un Pal mystérieux au corps composé de sève.
Ôtez-lui son couvre-chef et il se dessèchera progressivement jusqu'à pourrir.

name: Pupperai
description:
territorial disputes begin with a staredown
and end in a single, quick strike.
Training them to |stay| is risky business,
as the |go| command triggers that same attack instinct.
description_fr:
Les querelles de territoire entre commencent souvent par un simple regard... et se terminent par celui qui dégaine le plus vite.
D’ailleurs, mieux vaut éviter d'apprendre « Pas bouger » à un apprivoisé : au signal « Vas‑y », son instinct le pousse aussitôt à passer à l’attaque.

name: Clovee
description:
Some individuals once had three or more leaves on their foreheads.
Regarded as symbols of good fortune,
those with more leaves were heavily hunted,
leading the species to evolve fewer leaves over time.
description_fr:
Autrefois, certains individus arboraient trois feuilles ou plus sur le front.
Considérés comme des symboles de chance, les spécimens aux feuilles abondantes ont été capturés en masse.
L’espèce a depuis commencé à évoluer vers un nombre de feuilles moindre.

name: Jolthog
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand.
When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.
description:
It releases the electricity stored in its body when under attack.
The voltage it generates exceeds 10 million volts,
making it more lethal than any conventional heavy firearms when thrown.
description_fr:
Libère l'électricité accumulée à chaque impact subi.
Sa tension dépasse les 10 millions de volts.
Le lancer est plus meurtrier qu'une mauvaise utilisation d'arme lourde.

name: Jolthog Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand.
When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.
description:
It releases the cold air stored in its body when under attack.
The frigid blast it radiates is cold enough to freeze the surrounding air
and easily pierces through any attacker's body.
description_fr:
Libère l'air froid accumulé à chaque impact subi.
Le souffle émis radialement gèle l'atmosphère.
Le froid transperce l'assaillant sur tout le corps.

name: Depresso
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, Depresso
drinks a massive amount of energy drinks,
causing its movement speed to increase for a limited time.
description:
It has few friends because of the perpetually grouchy look on its face,
but it is in fact kindhearted.
Some have seen it feeding who have strayed from their pack.
description_fr:
Son regard méchant fait qu'il a peu d'amis malgré son grand cœur.
Il a été observé en train d'offrir de la nourriture à un séparé de son troupeau.

name: Pengullet
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher
and fires Pengullet as ammunition.
Pengullet explodes on contact and is incapacitated.
description:
The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared,
but sadly, its desire to fly has remained as strong as ever.
Even now, it tries to fly again in any way it can.
description_fr:
Ses plumes ont totalement disparu, l'empêchant de voler.
Cependant, un désir profond de voler, inscrit dans ses gènes, le pousse à essayer de nouveau, de toutes les manières possibles.

name: Pengullet Lux
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher 
and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. 
Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.
description:
The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, and it can no longer fly.
Yet its longing for the sky has turned to jealousy—
so it harnessed electricity to strike down those who still soar.
description_fr:
Ses ailes se sont atrophiées et ne lui permettent plus de voler.
Sa nostalgie du ciel s'est transformée en jalousie, et ses pouvoirs électriques lui permettent désormais d'abattre tout ce qui vole !

name: Penking
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
Surprisingly, it is unrelated to.
However, since this Pal gets pampered as it pleases,
for now, it's doing its best to strut arrogantly.
description_fr:
En réalité, cette espèce n’a presque aucun lien avec.
Mais comme on la couvre d’attentions sans raison, elle fait de son mieux pour se donner des airs importants.

name: Penking Lux
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
Its body changed color after gaining electricity to improve underwater hunting.
As a result, it lost the affection of —
but strangely enough, it now has a loyal follower:.
description_fr:
Pour mieux chasser sous l’eau, il a acquis le pouvoir de l’électricité, ce qui a changé sa couleur.
Depuis, les le tiennent à distance.
Mais allez savoir pourquoi... il s’est trouvé un nouveau disciple:.

name: Hoocrates
partner_skill_desc: While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.
description:
Often lost in thought, it sometimes
finds it difficult to sleep.
|I think, therefore I am.|
description_fr:
Se perd souvent dans ses pensées,
au point d’avoir du mal à dormir.
« Je pense, donc je suis. »

name: Melpaca
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to
Ranch.
description:
Don't be fooled by this Pal's fluffy appearance.
A hypersonic kick from one of its long legs may
send you flying to the other side of the world.
description_fr:
Ne jamais se laisser berner par sa douceur apparente.
Un seul de ses coups de pied ultra rapides suffit pour envoyer sa victime de l'autre côté du globe.

name: Kingpaca
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While in team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
serve this Pal.
Contests between offer up their vassals as a wager.
Those seen alone are losers of such contests.
description_fr:
Se fait servir par des.
Lors de duels entre, ils les mettent en jeu.
Les individus qui se retrouvent seuls sont des perdants.

name: Kingpaca Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While in team, Kingpaca Cryst helps carry supplies,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
With a heart of ice, this Pal is terrible at expressing its emotions.
A solitary individual is pitiable,
seen as too clumsy in the eyes of a.
description_fr:
De nature glaciale, il a beaucoup de mal à exprimer ses émotions.
Aux yeux d'un, un individu solitaire apparaît comme un dérèglement tragique.

name: Daedream
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, appears near the player.
Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.
description:
It puts those it is interested in to sleep and shows them
an endless stream of happy dreams.
Those who fall under its spell are never to wake until death takes them.
description_fr:
Plonge ceux qu'il aime dans un sommeil profond pour leur faire vivre le bonheur en rêve.
Ceux-là ne se réveillent plus jusqu'à leur mort.

name: Tanzee
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly
fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.
description:
Long ago, this Pal used long objects like tree branches as weapons.
After coming into contact with humans, however,
it found something slightly more effective: guns.
description_fr:
Utilisait autrefois des objets longs tels que des branches d'arbres, comme armes, mais a fini par les abandonner à force de côtoyer des humains.
Les armes à feu s'avérant en effet plus efficaces.

name: Tanzee Ignis
description:
Its palms have evolved to handle burning objects without getting scorched.
When its gun runs out of ammo,
it may grab the heated barrel with its bare hands and use it to club its foes.
description_fr:
Ses paumes ont évolué pour lui permettre d’attraper des objets brûlants sans se brûler.
S’il n’a plus de munitions, il pourrait bien saisir le canon surchauffé de son arme... et s’en servir pour frapper.

name: Nox
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.
description:
If you find hair in your bedding, you should
leave it where it lays and leave immediately.
Picking it up is a one-way-ticket to a never ending night.
description_fr: Si vous trouvez des poils de la nuit, vous feriez mieux de rebrousser chemin sans les ramasser si vous comptez revoir la lumière du jour.

name: Flambelle
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes produces Flame Organ
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
When it starts crying, this Pal produces magma in place of tears.
The magma that pours out is absorbed back into its body,
causing it to get hotter and hotter.
The more it cries, the stronger it becomes.
description_fr:
Ce Pal produit du magma au lieu de larmes lorsqu'il pleure.
Le magma sécrété est ensuite réabsorbé par le corps pour faire monter sa température.
Ainsi, plus il pleure, plus il devient fort.

name: Rooby
partner_skill_desc: While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals.
description:
Wild surprisingly never get sick.
Eating one piece of charcoal a day, made by burning a branch,
is the secret to its eternal health.
description_fr:
Les sauvages ne tombent jamais malades.
Consommer un morceau de charbon par jour obtenu en brûlant une branche est le secret de sa santé de fer.

name: Mau
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes digs up Gold Coin
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Its hard tail does not deteriorate even when cut off.
Some believed these severed tails bring good luck,
but for the innumerable who were
poached as a result, they were anything but.
description_fr:
Les tissus durs de sa queue ne se détériorent pas même lorsqu'elle est coupée.
Ce phénomène a longtemps été associé à la bonne fortune, entraînant le braconnage de nombreux.

name: Mau Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes digs up Gold Coin
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Its crystalline tail is beautiful, but shatters when this Pal dies.
Some believe it is good luck to raise them,
so in captivity are treated with great care.
description_fr:
Le superbe cristal qui constitue sa queue s'effrite à sa mort.
La croyance selon laquelle posséder plusieurs apporterait richesse et prospérité lui permettait d'être traité comme un roi.

name: Rushoar
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Increases efficiency of destroying boulders while mounted.
description:
Being an extremely aggressive Pal, it often picks fights before gauging its opponents' strength.
Though small, its powerful charge can even send boulders flying.
description_fr:
Très belliqueux, il engage les combats avant d'avoir pu évaluer la différence de force.
Ses charges pourraient venir à bout d'un gros rocher sans mal malgré sa petite taille.

name: Foxparks
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips to the player
and transforms into a flamethrower.
description:
It is unskilled at controlling fire from the moment it is born
and tends to choke on the flames it breathes unintentionally.
 sneezes are one of the leading causes of forest fires.
description_fr:
Très peu habile dans sa manipulation du feu à la naissance, le s'étouffe constamment avec ses propres flammes.
Ses éternuements peuvent provoquer des feux de forêt.

name: Foxparks Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips to the player
and attacks using frigid air.
description:
It is unskilled at controlling cold air from the moment it is born
and tends to choke on the frost it breathes unintentionally.
When catches a cold, its nasal discharge freezes,
making it difficult to breathe and causing it to panic.
description_fr:
Peu habile à contrôler le froid dès sa naissance, s'étouffe souvent avec le gel qu'il respire.
Lorsqu'il attrape un rhume, ses écoulements nasaux se figent, rendant sa respiration difficile et provoque un mouvement de panique.

name: Killamari
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider.
Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.
description:
It wraps itself around an enemy's head, sucking out their insides.
Pal mummies are occasionally found, but these are in fact
 victims.
description_fr:
Il mord le cou de ses ennemis pour en aspirer le contenu.
Les momies de Pals sont rares, mais la plupart sont des victimes de.

name: Killamari Primo
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. 
Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.
description:
It sinks its fangs into the enemy’s neck, draining every last drop of blood.
When two s latch onto each other,
they become locked in a relentless struggle—each trying to suck the other dry until one withers away.
description_fr:
Mord ses ennemis au cou pour les vider de leur sang.
Lorsque deux se mordent entre eux, ils tiennent bon jusqu'à ce que l'un s'assèche, et seule la décomposition de ce dernier permet de les séparer.

name: Fuddler
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, generates subtle vibrations
to detect nearby ore.
description:
Its large claws boast of diamond-like hardness.
However, sharpening these claws consumes most of its energy,
leading it to sometimes spending entire days doing nothing else.
description_fr: Ses grandes griffes sont aussi dures que le diamant, ce qui l'oblige à dépenser presque toute son énergie pour les aiguiser, jusqu'à parfois y passer la journée entière.

name: Eikthyrdeer
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can perform a double jump while mounted.
Increases efficiency of cutting trees.
description:
The one who possesses the most impressive antlers
becomes the leader of the herd.
If their antlers are broken, they become depressed
and leave the herd never to be seen again.
description_fr:
Celui qui a les plus beaux bois domine.
Lorsqu'ils se brisent, son cœur s'effondre avec.
Il quitte alors le troupeau pour mourir à l'abri des regards.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can perform a double jump while mounted.
Increases efficiency of cutting trees.
description:
The individual with the hardest horns becomes the leader.
Once the horns are lost, so too is its leadership status.
It leaves the herd amidst farewell glances and quietly returns to the earth.
description_fr:
L'individu aux bois les plus durs devient le chef.
Mais il perd ce statut quand ces derniers tombent.
Il doit alors quitter le troupeau pour retourner à la terre.

name: Direhowl
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Moves slightly faster than most mounts.
description:
Long ago would hunt alongside humans
but over the years this bond faded.
description_fr: Le lien entre les et les humains s’est estompé depuis longtemps, mais leur mode de chasse trouve son origine dans les chasses qu’ils menaient autrefois à leurs côtés.

name: Caprity
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
The shrub on this Pal's back produces berries as long as it is properly fed.
It offers these berries to potential mates, and if the flavor is to their liking, romance blossoms.
description_fr:
Tant qu’il n’est pas affamé, le buisson sur son dos produit des baies.
Il les offre à celui ou celle qui lui plaît: si le charme opère, le couple est formé.

name: Caprity Noct
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
The berries that grow on its back change flavor according to its emotions.
The harsher the environment it grows in, the sweeter the berries become.
This is why most raised in captivity have never known love.

name: Swee
partner_skill_desc: While in team, Sweepa's stats will be increased.
description:
Crawling along the ground, it eats microscopic organic matter.
After a while, it discharges any substances that provide no nutrition.
By using it as a mop for cleaning, everyone wins!
description_fr:
Rampe sur le sol pour se nourrir de minuscules matières organiques.
Tout ce qui n'est pas nutritif est excrété après un certain temps.
Il y a tout à gagner à l'utiliser comme aspirateur.

name: Sweepa
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While fighting together, stats will increase the more Swee are in your team.
description:
While hibernating, a large number of
hide within its voluminous body hair.
The most ever recorded is 101.
description_fr:
Abrite un nombre important de dans ses longs poils en période d'hibernation.
On y a déjà retrouvé jusqu'à 101 individus.

name: Turtacle
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Turtacle helps carry supplies, 
decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.
description:
To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell.
Unfortunately, it's utterly defenseless underneath.
Even a little tickle could knock it out cold.
description_fr:
Pour protéger son fragile corps, il s'est doté d'une solide carapace.
Cependant, en échange, il a perdu presque toute résistance, et une simple chatouille peut le faire s'évanouir.

name: Turtacle Terra
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Turtacle Terra helps carry supplies, 
decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory. 
Also increases Attack of Ground Pals.
description:
To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell.
With most of its senses concentrated in its limbs and shell,
it can’t even tell if someone quietly touches its core.
description_fr:
A acquis une carapace à toute épreuve pour protéger sa peau très fine.
Ses points sensibles étant concentrés sur ses pattes et sa carapace, il est possible de toucher son corps sans qu'il ne s'en rende compte.

name: Hangyu
description:
Its gigantic arms can rip apart even iron.
As a particularly cruel form of execution, serious criminals
would be strung up in a public square, and a
would tear the skin right from their bones.
description_fr:
Ses énormes bras peuvent rompre jusqu'au métal.
 a d'ailleurs déjà fait office de bourreau pour exécuter des criminels sur la place publique en déchirant leur corps comme du papier.

name: Hangyu Cryst
description:
Its gigantic arms can tear through blocks of ice.
There were times when great sinners were tied in the town square
and had their hair torn out by
as a brutal form of public humiliation.
description_fr:
Ses énormes bras peuvent briser jusqu'aux blocs de glace.
 a d'ailleurs déjà fait office de bourreau pour humilier les criminels sur la place publique en leur arrachant violemment les cheveux.

name: Woolipop
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes drops Cotton Candy
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Its entire body is 18,000 times sweeter than sugar.
Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent will find themselves
overwhelmed by sweetness
and even pass out should they take a bite of this Pal.
description_fr:
Son corps tout entier est 18 000 fois plus sucré que le sucre.
Les Pals carnivores bernés par son odeur qui le mordent souffrent rapidement d'hyperglycémie et perdent connaissance.

name: Woolipop Terra
description:
Its fur emits a sweet smell, but its meat is disgustingly bitter.
Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent into taking a bite will find themselves overwhelmed by the foul taste and pass out.
description_fr:
Sa fourrure exhale un parfum sucré et entêtant, mais sa chair est d’une amertume atroce.
Les Pals carnivores attirés par l’odeur y plantent les crocs et finissent les yeux révulsés, terrassés par l’amertume.

name: Mozzarina
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes produces Milk
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Milk pours from this Pal like water from an open faucet,
regardless of its gender.
It's truly a mystery of life, although this mystery may be better left unsolved.
description_fr:
Le lait coule de ce Pal comme l'eau d'un robinet, et ce peu importe son sexe.
Un véritable mystère de la vie.

name: Azurobe
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden to travel on water.
Changes the player's attack type to Water while mounted.
description:
This Pal's white ribbon turns black if doused with impure water.
Given its usefulness in detecting poison, this Pal was once overhunted.
This past has left them bitter towards humanity.
description_fr:
Son ruban blanc noircit au contact d'une eau impure.
Sa faculté à identifier les toxines a ainsi longtemps mené à son braconnage, le poussant à entretenir une certaine rancœur envers les humains.

name: Azurobe Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden to travel on water. 
Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.
description:
This Pal’s white ribbon continuously absorbs heat from its surroundings,
yet its temperature remains curiously unchanged.
This strange ability once made it a target of relentless hunting,
leaving it with a deep mistrust of humans to this day.
description_fr:
Son ruban blanc absorbe sans fin la chaleur autour de lui... et pourtant, il reste froid, immuable.
Cette propriété anormale a conduit jadis à sa traque.
Depuis, il garde une rancune glaciale envers les humains.

name: Sparkit
partner_skill_desc: While in team, increases Attack of Electric Pals.
description:
During the dry season,
this Pal is always on the verge of blowing a fuse.
Sparks can fly with even the slightest provocation,
even amongst allies.
description_fr:
Sa sensibilité pendant la saison sèche le rend très nerveux.
Des étincelles en présence de ses semblables annoncent une violente bagarre.

name: Kelpsea
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Water Pals. Sometimes drops Pal Fluids
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Its personality changes depending
on the quality of the water it was born into.
 born into polluted waters are generally
ill-tempered and quickly become delinquents.
description_fr:
Sa personnalité varie en fonction de la qualité de l'eau sur son lieu de naissance.
Les nés dans une étendue d'eau croupie ont généralement tendance à mal tourner.

name: Kelpsea Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals. Sometimes drops Flame Organ
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
Its personality changes depending
on the temperature of the water it was born into.
 born in warm waters generally have
a passionate, motivated personality.
description_fr:
Sa personnalité varie en fonction de la température de l'eau sur son lieu de naissance.
Un né dans une étendue d'eau chaude a généralement tendance à l'hyperactivité.

name: Ribbuny
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals.
While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at 
Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.
description:
A Pal that's never without a bright smile.
Occasionally, its tentacles get tied up in knots by 's pranks.
During those moments, its expression turns demonic.
description_fr:
Un Pal qui affiche en permanence un sourire radieux.
Cependant, il arrive que s’amuse à nouer ses tentacules.
Dans ce cas, Ribbuny se met à le tabasser... sans jamais cesser de sourire.

name: Ribbuny Botan
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals.
While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at 
Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.
description:
Always wears a cheerful smile.
Sometimes, thanks to 's pranks,
they end up tangled in tentacles and have to fight their way out!
Even in tough situations, they keep smiling cheerfully.
description_fr:
Un Pal qui affiche en permanence un sourire radieux.
Cependant, il arrive que s’amuse à serrer ses tentacules en nœuds.
Dans ce cas, Ribbuny se met à le tabasser... sans jamais cesser de sourire.

name: Jelliette
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
increases items obtained from fishing.
While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base,
Jelliette's watering speed is increased.
description:
A Pal that closely resembles.
It’s very social, so when plans overlap,
it asks its good friend to go in its place.
As thanks, one date.
description_fr:
Ce Pal ressemble étrangement à.
Très sociable, il arrive qu’il ait plusieurs rendez-vous en même temps.
Dans ce cas, il demande à son ami de le remplacer.
En échange? Un petit rencard.

name: Jellroy
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
increases items obtained from salvage.
While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base,
Jellroy's watering speed is increased.
description:
A Pal that closely resembles.
It sometimes appears as a substitute when is unavailable.
Its acting is so flawless that no one ever notices the switch.
description_fr:
Ce Pal ressemble comme deux gouttes d’eau à.
Quand cette dernière est indisponible, il prend parfois sa place en douce.
Son jeu d’acteur est si convaincant... que personne ne remarque jamais la supercherie.

name: Amione
description: If one disappears, another simply shows up to take its place, and life goes on like nothing happened. For, companionship is everything.
description_fr:
Si l’un des deux vient à manquer, un remplaçant surgit de nulle part.
Ils reprennent alors leur vie ensemble comme si rien ne s’était passé.
Pour eux, l’important est simplement de rester unis.

name: Gloopie
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, 
the capture gauge decreases more slowly 
in the fishing minigame 
when the bar is not aligned.
description:
Be sure to check your plans for the next day before falling asleep with this Pal.
Its suction cups leave marks that look suspiciously like hickeys.
One sleepy cuddle session could lead to some
truly awkward misunderstandings.
description_fr:
Avant de dormir à ses côtés, mieux vaut faire le point sur vos plans le lendemain.
Les marques de ses ventouses ressemblent à s’y méprendre à des suçons.
Se faire aspirer en pleine nuit pourrait entraîner de fâcheux malentendus...

name: Gloopie Primo
description:
Be sure to check your plans for the next day before falling asleep with this Pal.
Its suction cups leave marks that look suspiciously like bite marks.
One sleepy cuddle session could lead to some
truly unnecessary concern.
description_fr:
Avant de dormir à ses côtés, mieux vaut vérifier vos plans pour le lendemain.
Les marques de ses ventouses ressemblent à s’y méprendre à des morsures.
Se faire aspirer en pleine nuit pourrait provoquer des inquiétudes inutiles.

name: Galeclaw
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. 
Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.
description:
A Pal that can easily take flight even while grasping a human.
It is, however, prone to letting go when tired,
which has led to the sudden demise of more than a few souls.
description_fr:
Peut facilement emmener un humain dans les airs.
Cependant, il relâche ses serres sans pitié une fois fatigué, entraînant nombre de chutes mortelles.

name: Wispaw
description:
The ghostly hands behind it embody the souls of all humans
who have raised its kind.
Lately, they seem to have reached a unanimous consensus to dote on.
description_fr:
Les pensées de tous ceux qui ont pris soin de son espèce se sont accumulées dans les mains qui flottent derrière lui.
Ces derniers temps, il semblerait que leur volonté commune soit surtout de le chouchouter.

name: Nitewing
partner_skill_desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount.
description:
It carries newborn Pals to its nest and raises them
as a surrogate parent.
Once the baby Pal has fattened up, it hunts them.
description_fr:
Il emmène les nouveaux-nés Pals dans son nid pour les élever à la place de leurs parents.
Puis il les dévore une fois à son goût.

name: Tombat
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to
detect the location of nearby Pals.
description:
Often appears out of the blue to flaunt its prized wings in front of other Pals.
Although this appears to be an intimidation tactic,
the Pal seems to derive some kind of pleasure from the display.
description_fr:
Apparaît soudainement devant d'autres Pals et déploie fièrement ses ailes pour s’exhiber.
On pourrait croire à une tentative d’intimidation, mais son expression semble plutôt empreinte d’une étrange extase.

name: Tocotoco
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, equips to the player
and transforms into an egg launcher.
description:
A frightening Pal that produces exploding eggs.
It often fires these eggs from its rear end as a form of defense,
but when spent, the Pal itself explodes.
description_fr:
Un Pal terrifiant qui pond des œufs explosifs.
Il tire habituellement les œufs de son derrière pour s'en servir comme armes, mais il lui arrive de se faire exploser avec dans les cas désespérés.

name: Univolt
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.
description:
It used to be considered an emissary of the Thunder God,
and thus was not hunted by people.
However, after witnesses observed one die from a lightning strike,
its reverence faded, and it quite literally fell into the role of a workhorse.
description_fr:
Autrefois considéré comme le messager du dieu de la foudre, nul n’osait le chasser.
Mais le jour où on le vit mourir frappé par la foudre, la croyance vacilla... et il dégringola littéralement au rang de cheval de trait.

name: Univolt Cryst
description:
It used to be considered an emissary of the Winter God,
and thus was not hunted by people.
However, after witnesses observed one lose its footing on the ice,
its reverence faded, and it quite literally slid into the role of a workhorse.
description_fr:
Autrefois considéré comme le messager du dieu de l’hiver, nul n’osait le chasser.
Mais le jour où on le vit trébucher sur la glace, la croyance vacilla... et il dégringola littéralement au rang de cheval de trait.

name: Gobfin
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Aqua Gun.
While in team, increases player's Attack.
description:
Long ago, it was a giant and powerful aquatic Pal.
However, as food became scarce, it evolved to live on land.
Since walking requires much energy, it gradually became smaller
and is now a small and puny Pal.
description_fr:
Autrefois un Pal aquatique aussi énorme que puissant, la raréfaction de sa nourriture l'a poussé à remonter à la surface.
A progressivement rapetissé afin d'avoir assez d'énergie pour marcher.

name: Gobfin Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Spirit Fire.
While in team, increases player's Attack.
description:
Long ago, it was a giant and powerful aquatic Pal.
However, as food became scarce, it evolved to live on land.
Since walking burns many calories, it astonishingly awakened its power
to control fire!
description_fr:
Autrefois un Pal aquatique aussi énorme que puissant, la raréfaction de sa nourriture l'a poussé à remonter à la surface.
À force de brûler des calories pour marcher, il a fini par acquérir des pouvoirs de feu !

name: Loupmoon
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Jumping Claw.
description:
The horns on its head grow under the moonlight.
It doesn't hate the sun, but its horns
itch when sunlight hits them.
description_fr:
Les cornes sur sa tête poussent lorsqu'elles sont exposées au clair de lune.
Non pas qu'il déteste le soleil, mais la lumière du jour lui provoque des picotements aux cornes.

name: Loupmoon Cryst
description:
The horns on its head are made of a mysterious ice that never melts.
Shaved ice made by breaking off a horn is truly exquisite,
but both the one who tries it and end up with a headache.
description_fr:
Ses cornes sont faites d’une mystérieuse glace qui ne fond jamais.
La glace pilée obtenue en les brisant est paraît-il délicieuse... mais aussi bien celui qui en mange que en ressortent avec un sérieux mal de tête.

name: Cawgnito
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Phantom Peck.
description:
Long ago it freely soared the skies.
After losing a contest with, it abandoned the skies,
and now lives a secretive life in the dark of night.
description_fr:
Autrefois, il sillonnait librement le ciel.
Mais après avoir perdu face à, il y renonça pour vivre discrètement dans l’obscurité.

name: Arsox
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.
description:
In ancient times, carnivorous Pals pursued them relentlessly.
The absurd fury in the cries of transformed into a raging inferno,
which has been passed on to this day.
description_fr:
Se faisait constamment attaquer par des Pals carnivores il fut un temps.
Les cris incessants des ont alors engendré des flammes au fil des générations.

name: Muffly
description:
Its soft facial fluff softens any hit,
but it cannot groom itself well nor scratch its itches,
leaving it in a constant state of mild frustration.
description_fr:
Le duvet autour de son visage absorbe les chocs.
Même projeté au loin, il s’en sort sans difficulté.
En revanche, il a du mal à lisser ses plumes et ne peut pas se gratter là où ça démange, ce qui le frustre un peu.

name: Bristla
partner_skill_desc: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals.
description:
This prickly Pal's thorns are highly poisonous.
It is friendly with and only smiles
while a is drinking its nectar.
description_fr:
Ses épines contiennent des toxines dangereuses pour la santé.
En bons termes avec, son visage ne s'éclaircit que lorsque ce dernier la butine.

name: Cinnamoth
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with
Poison Fog.
description:
Sniffing its scales produces a feeling of unparalleled euphoria.
There was some effort to further regulate this byproduct,
but the Free Pal Alliance have vehemently opposed these measures,
putting a stop to them.
description_fr:
Inhaler ses écailles procure un plaisir incomparable.
Bien que des mesures aient été envisagées pour renforcer la régulation,
les associations de protection des Pals s’y sont farouchement opposées,
empêchant toute avancée.

name: Puffolt
description:
Its fluffy fur absorbs tremendous amounts of water when soaked.
Shaking it dry releases a powerful electrical discharge,
making bath time together a serious gamble.
description_fr:
Lorsqu’il est plongé dans l’eau, son pelage duveteux en absorbe une grande quantité.
En se secouant pour l’expulser, il libère une grande décharge électrique.
Se baigner avec lui est à vos risques et périls.

name: Elphidran
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
While flying, movement speed is increased.
While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests.
Perhaps because of this, it is sometimes unable to discern good from evil,
often allowing wrongdoers to take advantage of it.
description_fr:
Aussi innocent qu'il en a l'air.
Il peine ainsi à faire la distinction entre bien et mal et a tendance à être exploité par les personnes malintentionnées.

name: Elphidran Aqua
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
While flying, movement speed is increased.
While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests.
Perhaps because of this, it harbors no ill will in any of its actions
and is indifferent even after killing someone.
description_fr:
Aussi innocent qu'il en a l'air.
C'est peut-être ce qui explique l'absence totale de mauvaises intentions dans ses actions.

name: Vanwyrm
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Increases damage player deals
to enemy weak points while mounted.
description:
The melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a
are said to cross whole mountain ranges.
In ages past, such flutes were used to signal an attack.
description_fr:
Une flûte fabriquée à partir de l’exosquelette de se ferait entendre au-delà de mille montagnes.
Dans les guerres d’autrefois, elle servait de signal d’assaut.

name: Vanwyrm Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Increases damage player deals
to enemy weak points while mounted.
description:
The melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a
are said to cross whole mountain ranges.
In ages past, such flutes were used to signal victory in battle.
description_fr:
Une flûte fabriquée à partir de l’exosquelette de se ferait entendre au-delà de mille montagnes.
Dans les guerres d’autrefois, elle était utilisée comme cri de victoire.

name: Felbat
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat the life steal effect
which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.
description:
Attacking from the shadows,
this Pal traps its prey within its cloak-like wings.
It's probably best not to know what happens within them,
or why the inside of its wings are stained red.
description_fr:
Bondit sur sa proie depuis les ténèbres et l’enferme dans ses ailes semblables à une cape.
Mieux vaut ne pas savoir ce qui s’y passe... ni pourquoi l’intérieur de ses ailes est rouge.

name: Vaelet
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, Ground Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
The castle was filled with the king's favorite flowers.
A great battle ensued, and flames approached the castle.
Amidst the chaos, the spirit of a flower appeared.
- From the fairy tale, |The King's Flower.|
description_fr:
Le château était rempli des fleurs préférées du roi.
Une grande bataille s'ensuivit et le feu gagna le château.
C'est alors que l'esprit d'une unique fleur apparut.
- Tiré du conte de fées « La Fleur du Roi ».

name: Beegarde
partner_skill_desc:
Sometimes drops Honey when
assigned to Ranch.
While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.
description:
A servant that pledges loyalty to.
Any that cause harm to the queen are immediately expelled from the hive.
It will gladly give its life to protect its queen.
description_fr:
Un serviteur qui jure allégeance à.
Il éliminera tous ceux susceptibles de nuire à sa reine, quitte à y laisser sa vie.

name: Elizabee
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, stats will increase the more
Beegarde are in your team.
description:
A chosen queen to rule over s.
There is a never ending stream of servants willing to work themselves to death
for the pleasure of serving their queen.
description_fr:
La reine proclamée régnant sur les.
La joie de servir qui anime ses laquais les pousse à travailler jusqu'à ce que mort s'ensuive.

name: Lovander
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander the life steal effect
which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.
description:
Seeking a night of love, it is always chasing someone around.
At first it only showed interest in other Pals, but in recent years
even humans have become the target of its debauchery.
description_fr:
Court toujours après quelqu'un à la recherche d'une amourette.
S'il ne s'intéressait au départ qu'aux Pals, il a récemment étendu ses mains démoniaques aux humains.

name: Grintale
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Enhances Neutral attacks while mounted.
description:
's eyes light up the moment
anyone enters its territory.
This is no figure of speech—its eyes literally light up.
description_fr:
Les yeux alertes d'un se mettent à briller dès que quelque chose foule son territoire.
Ce n'est pas une analogie, ils brillent pour de vrai.

name: Tarantriss
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden. 
Can double jump while mounted.
Additionally, can shoot spider silk to grapple and move at fast speed.
description:
Extremely sticky and clingy.
The more it's resisted, the more tenacious it becomes.
Such is its |personality.|
description_fr:
Très, voire trop collant.
D'autant plus si la proie se débat.
On vous aura prévenus.

name: Polapup
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden. 
Runs faster over snow.
Can slide quickly down slopes.
description:
Among s, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect.
Sometimes, a too-forceful leap sends one tumbling from the sky—
a common sight during territorial season.
Forecast: clear skies with a chance of flying s.
description_fr:
Celui qui glisse le plus vite sur la neige est le plus respecté.
Parfois, un excès d’élan envoie l’un d’eux bondir si haut... qu’il retombe du ciel.
En période de rivalité pour le titre de chef, ces incidents se multiplient.
Prévisions météo: ciel dégagé avec quelques chutes de.

name: Polapup Terra
description:
Among s, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect.
Sometimes, a too-forceful leap leaves one buried in the snow—
a common sight during particularly competitive seasons.
Traffic forecast: heavy congestion.
description_fr:
Celui qui glisse le plus vite sur la neige est le plus respecté.
Parfois, un excès d’élan envoie l’un d’eux bondir si loin... qu’il finit enfoui dans la neige.
En période de rivalité pour le titre de chef, ces incidents se multiplient.
Prévisions d’embouteillages:.

name: Leezpunk
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, utilizes its sixth sense
to detect nearby dungeons.
description:
A Pal that always takes great care to maintain a stylish stance.
Always on the hunt for the coolest poses, if given a mirror
it will spend all day posing in front of it.
description_fr:
Toujours à la recherche de la pose la plus cool, il met un point d'honneur à se tenir debout.
Donnez-lui un miroir et il explorera toutes les postures possibles.

name: Leezpunk Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, utilizes its sixth sense
to detect nearby dungeons.
description:
A Pal that has an unusual obsession with their standing posture.
Always in search of the hottest pose,
this Pal's owner is constantly presented with fervent stances.
description_fr:
Un Pal qui s'efforce de toujours maintenir sa posture.
Toujours à l'affût de la plus belle cambrure, son propriétaire sera constamment livré à ses poses suggestives.

name: Gorirat
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, unleashes a primal fury that
increases Gorirat's Attack for a limited time.
description:
It beats the ground rhythmically to communicate with its comrades.
The meaning of each rhythm differs by troop, but the distinction
between them is still largely unknown.
description_fr:
Communique avec ses congénères en frappant le sol.
La signification du rythme choisi varie d'un groupe à l'autre, ce qui rend sa classification encore hasardeuse.

name: Gorirat Terra
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, unleashes a primal fury that
increases Gorirat Terra's Attack for a limited time.
description:
It beats the ground rhythmically to communicate with its comrades.
Stronger than, if every
hit the ground at the same time, the island would sink in 1 second.
description_fr:
Communique avec ses congénères au rythme de ses coups au sol.
Sa puissance supérieure à celle des fait que si tous les frappaient le sol à l'unisson, Palpagos sombrerait sous les eaux en une seconde.

name: Surfent
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden to travel on water.
While mounted, prevents stamina depletion
while moving on water.
description:
Its hydrodynamic form is well suited for activities on water.
Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards.
description_fr:
Sa forme profilée est adaptée aux activités nautiques.
Est souvent capturé par les braconniers pour être substitué aux planches de surf.

name: Surfent Terra
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While in team, Surfent Terra helps carry supplies,
decreasing the weight of ores in the player's inventory.
description:
Its aerodynamic form is well suited for activities on sand.
Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards.
description_fr:
Sa forme profilée est adaptée aux activités sur sable.
Est souvent capturé par les braconniers pour être substitué aux planches de surf.

name: Robinquill
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together,
allows you to deal more damage to weak points.
description:
A Pal that is very similar to humans who hunt and live in the forests.
It may prove to be a key for understanding what Pals are
and how they diverged from humans in the distant past.
description_fr: Un Pal très proche des humains qui vit de la chasse dans la forêt. Il semble découler d'une lignée différente de celle des humains malgré un ancêtre commun, ce qui pourrait expliquer l'origine des Pals.

name: Robinquill Terra
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together,
allows you to deal more damage to weak points.
description:
A Pal that is very similar to humans who hunt and live in the rocky areas.
When bones are found in ruins,
there are always human bones found nearby as well.
description_fr:
Très proche des humains, ce Pal vit de la chasse dans les
zones rocailleuses.
Lorsque l'on retrouve des os de, ils sont systématiquement accompagnés de restes humains.

name: Flopie
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, appears near the player.
Automatically picks up nearby items.
description:
It prefers places that have an abundance of vegetation,
but hay fever has apparently become a problem for
 as of late.
description_fr: Le apprécie les lieux avec beaucoup de végétation, malgré le rhume des foins qui semble le frapper ces derniers temps.

name: Wixen
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Fire.
description:
With the power of light, it produces arcane phenomena.
It prefers to eat food well-done and is particularly hostile towards.
description_fr:
Manipule le pouvoir de la lumière et exécute de mystérieux sorts.
Il préfère tout manger bien grillé, voire très cuit.
Ne s’entend pas avec.

name: Wixen Noct
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.
description:
Due to its upbringing,
it no longer cares about whether its food is cooked enough.
This Pal stopped worrying about those details,
and just prefers its food to be as sweet as possible.
Not on good terms with.
description_fr:
L’éducation de ses parents l’a amené à ne plus se soucier de détails comme le fait que la nourriture soit cuite ou non.
Il préfère tout ce qui est sucré.
Ne s’entend pas avec.

name: Katress
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
With the power of shadows, it produces arcane phenomena.
It prefers to eat food raw and is particularly hostile towards.
description_fr:
Manipule les pouvoirs de l’ombre pour exécuter d’étranges sortilèges.
Il aime consommer ses aliments crus.
Il est en mauvais termes avec.

name: Katress Ignis
partner_skill_desc: While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
Due to its upbringing,
it no longer cares about whether its food is raw enough.
This Pal stopped worrying about those details,
and just prefers its food to be as spicy as possible.
Not on good terms with.
description_fr:
L’éducation de ses parents lui a appris à ne plus se soucier de détails tels que le fait que la nourriture soit crue ou non.
Il préfère tout ce qui est épicé.
Il est en mauvais termes avec.

name: Helzephyr
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.
description:
It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell.
Those who dies from 's lightning
are sure to have their soul sent to the underworld.
description_fr:
Fait s'abattre la foudre des enfers.
Une mortpar brûlure de enverra votre âme directement dans l'abîme.

name: Helzephyr Lux
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.
description:
It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell.
While considered a subspecies of,
there's a theory that suggests, struck by lightning from hell,
will transform into.
description_fr:
Fait s’abattre la foudre des enfers.
Considéré comme une sous-espèce de, mais une autre théorie avance que c’est au contraire un frappé par cette foudre qui serait devenu.

name: Elgrove
description:
The leaf on its horn cannot be removed, no matter how hard it is pulled.
When the leaf falls on its own, accepts its time has come.
description_fr:
Les feuilles accrochées à ses cornes ne peuvent être arrachées, quel que soit l’effort fourni.
Lorsqu’elles tombent d’elles-mêmes, comprend que sa fin est proche.

name: Elgrove Cryst
description:
Its frozen horn stays solid through its life.
When water begins to drip from this ice,
 feels the chill of its own life slipping away.
description_fr:
De son vivant, ses cornes de glace ne fondent jamais.
Mais dès que l’eau s’en met à couler, sait que ses derniers instants approchent.

name: Lunaris
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, Lunaris manipulates gravity,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
It can control those who carelessly stare into its eyes.
Those seen with a are in its mind,
simply under its control.
description_fr:
Manipule quiconque croise son regard.
C'est d'ailleurs souvent dans ce but si reste à vos côtés.

name: Fenglope
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can double jump while mounted.
description:
In ages past, its beautiful visage was a common sight in paintings.
As time passed, its beautiful pelt and antlers were
often seen in works of art.
description_fr:
Il y a bien longtemps, sa beauté en faisait un sujet de prédilection pour les peintres.
Mais avec le temps, sa fourrure et ses cornes ont fini par servir de matériaux pour créer des œuvres d’art.

name: Fenglope Lux
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can double jump while mounted.
While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
In ages past, it was believed that drawing a picture of
would result in being struck down by lightning.
As time passes, artworks depicting became revered as
charms to ward off lightning, making them a common presence.
description_fr:
Il y a bien longtemps, on pensait que dessiner un ferait s'abattre la foudre sur soi.
Mais au fil des années, les représentations de devinrent
des sortes d'amulettes pour se prémunir contre cette même foudre.

name: Dinossom
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.
description:
A Pal who once angered cannot be pacified.
It rages on and on like an inferno.
The phrase |step on a 's tail| has come to mean enraging someone.
description_fr:
Échappe à tout contrôle une fois en colère et se déchaîne comme une tornade.
L’expression « marcher sur la queue d’un » signifie mettre quelqu’un en colère.

name: Dinossom Lux
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.
description:
Though struck by lightning, it lives on.
The phrase |struck by a 's bolt| has come to mean
narrowly escaping death.
description_fr:
Frappé par la foudre, il a échappé de peu à la mort.
L’expression « la foudre frappe un » signifie échapper de justesse à la mort.

name: Bushi
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Iaigiri.
description:
Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation.
If someone other than a wields this blade, the soul within
torments them until they are driven mad.
description_fr:
Lorsqu’il meurt, son corps se change en lame, transmise à la génération suivante.
Si quelqu’un d’autre qu’un la brandit, il est assailli par les voix des morts qu’elle renferme et sombre dans la folie.

name: Bushi Noct
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Iaigiri.
description:
Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation.
If the who inherits it has a weak heart,
the voices of the dead will drive it mad.
The madness turns it into that endlessly wanders.
description_fr:
Lorsqu’il meurt, son corps se change en lame, transmise à la génération suivante.
Si le qui en hérite manque de force d’esprit, il est assailli par les voix des morts qu’elle renferme, se transforme en et erre sans fin.

name: Munchill
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, 
making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.
description:
The inside of its mouth stays pleasantly cold,
making it a natural fridge when closed.
Its saliva contains enzymes that prevent food from rotting.
Thus, it can serve as a food locker for humans—
whether it is sanitary or not is another matter entirely.
description_fr:
Sa bouche est un véritable réfrigérateur naturel.
Lorsqu’elle se referme, l’intérieur devient si frais qu’il empêche la nourriture de pourrir, grâce à une salive aux propriétés conservatrices uniques.
Elle pourrait servir de garde-manger pour humains...
mais mieux vaut ne pas trop creuser la question côté hygiène.

name: Mammorest
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.
description:
The vegetation on its back varies between individuals.
There is a long history of appreciating this veritable garden of a Pal,
and there are even pruning specialists.
description_fr:
La végétation sur le dos d’un varie d’un individu à l’autre.
Autrefois prisé comme ornement vivant, il existait même des spécialistes chargés de l’élaguer.

name: Mammorest Cryst
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.
description:
The vegetation on its back varies between individuals.
There was a time when seeds of presumed extinct plants were found
still frozen on the back of a.
description_fr:
La végétation sur son dos est propre à chaque individu.
On a déjà retrouvé, sur le dos d’un, des graines de plantes considérées comme éteintes, encore à l’état gelé.

name: Finsider
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Finsider helps carry supplies, 
decreasing the weight of weapons 
in the player's inventory.
description:
It looks like something is peeking out from inside a costume,
but even if you reach inside, there’s nothing there.
In fact, you can keep reaching deeper and deeper.
Perhaps the universe itself lies within.
description_fr:
On dirait qu'il y a quelque chose qui se cache dans son costume, mais lorsque l'on y plonge la main, il n'y a rien.
Pire encore, on peut y enfoncer la main de plus en plus profondément.
Peut-être que l'univers tout entier se cache ici.

name: Finsider Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, 
Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, 
decreasing the weight of weapons 
in the player's inventory. 
Also increases Attack of Fire Pals.
description:
Even if you reach into its mouth, there’s nothing inside—it just keeps going.
Thinking it might be an interdimensional space, one researcher
tried climbing in like a sleeping bag.
But when the gag reflex kicked in, they realized...
it’s definitely part of the creature’s body.
description_fr:
On peut plonger la main dans sa bouche sans jamais toucher le fond.
Un chercheur, persuadé qu’il s’agissait d’un espace interdimensionnel, a tenté d’y glisser tout son corps, pensant en faire un sac de couchage.
Mais comme la créature s’est mise à avoir des haut-le-cœur...
il a fallu se rendre à l’évidence: c’est bien un organe interne.

name: Petallia
partner_skill_desc:
When activated,
uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's Health.
description:
A Pal that transforms into a massive plant when at the end of its life.
Once every ten years, a beautiful flower blooms
and a new is born.
description_fr:
À la fin de sa vie, il se transforme en une immense plante.
Une superbe fleur y éclot une fois tous les dix ans et donne naissance à un nouveau.

name: Petallia Ignis
description:
A Pal that burns away into a pile of ash upon the end of its life.
The surrounding soil becomes incredibly fertile,
allowing an abundance of vegetation to thrive for the following decade.
description_fr:
À la fin de sa vie, il se consume et se réduit en cendres.
Le sol alentour devient particulièrement fertile, pendant une dizaine d’années, une végétation abondante y prospère.

name: Leafan
description:
To hone the martial art passed down through a single bloodline:
Daily training is the only way!

Being distracted by romance? Unthinkable!
Daily discipline is the only way!

The time has come! Shoot my shot!
Instant rejection, that’s all there is!

The techniques of love were never passed down...
Lingering regret, that’s all there is!
description_fr:
Comment perfectionner l'art martial de ses ancêtres? L'entraînement!
Comment éviter toute distraction amoureuse? L'entraînement!
L'heure de révéler ses sentiments est arrivée? Rejet assuré!
Les techniques de l’amour ne font pas partie de l’héritage... il ne reste que les regrets!

name: Incineram
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Hellfire Claw.
description:
In the dark of night, this Pal snatches prey to bring back to its territory.
What happens to those poor souls afterwards isn't too hard to imagine.
description_fr:
Il attrape ses proies la nuit pour les ramener sur son territoire.
On imagine sans peine ce que les Pals capturés subissent ensuite.

name: Incineram Noct
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a
powerful Hellfire Claw.
description:
It specifically targets baby Pals, taking them back to its domain.
One can only imagine the profound despair
of a parent whose child has been taken away.
description_fr:
Cible uniquement les bébés Pals pour les ramener sur son territoire.
Difficile d'imaginer le désespoir des parents qui ont ainsi perdu leurs enfants.

name: Dazzi
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, appears near the player.
Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.
description:
Often kind to lonely Pals.
However, the moment a Pal mistakes this for actual friendship,
it seizes the opportunity to blast them with a thunderbolt.
description_fr:
Souvent attentionné envers les Pals isolés.
Ce n'est qu'une fois que ces derniers prennent ce comportement comme une marque d'amitié qu'il les frappe d'un éclair.

name: Dazzi Noct
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, appears near the player.
Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.
description:
Often kind to lonely Pals,
it plots to lure them into dropping their guard before striking them down.
Yet, unable to find the right moment, it ends up making friends with them instead.
description_fr:
Se montre amical avec les Pals isolés pour ensuite les foudroyer au premier signe d'inattention.
C'était là l'idée, mais incapable de déceler ce signe, il s'arrête systématiquement à la partie amicale.

name: Pyrin
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.
description:
Its entire body has evolved into a highly efficient radiator,
gifting it with astounding stamina.
If someone rides it, this Pal takes caution not to burn them.
description_fr:
Son corps entier agit comme un organe de dissipation thermique extrêmement efficace, lui conférant une endurance remarquable.
Lorsqu’on le monte, il prend soin d’éviter de brûler son cavalier.

name: Pyrin Noct
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.
description:
It burns mysterious dark matter as energy
and expels the remaining particles from its body.
If someone rides it, they should take care so as not to gallop down the path of darkness.
description_fr:
Il brûle une mystérieuse matière noire pour produire de l’énergie et rejette les particules obscures restantes par tout son corps.
Lorsqu’on le monte, il veille à éviter que son cavalier ne sombre dans les ténèbres.

name: Relaxaurus
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
description:
Contrary to its blasé appearance, it's quite ferocious.
It perceives everything in its sight as prey
and will stop at nothing to devour it.
description_fr:
Plutôt féroce en opposition à son apparence blasée.
Il perçoit tout ce qui bouge comme une proie et ne reculera devant rien pour la dévorer.

name: Relaxaurus Lux
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.
description:
One day, had an idea.
Maybe it was about time for a change.
Just then, an electric shock raced through its body!
description_fr:
eut un éclair de génie.
« L'heure du changement a sonné », pensa-t-il.
C'est alors qu'un choc électrique vint parcourir tout son corps.

name: Foxcicle
partner_skill_desc: While in team, increases Attack of Ice Pals.
description:
On nights when the aurora is visible,
it looks up towards the sky and begins to howl a beautiful song.
This does, however, leave it vulnerable to attacks from enemies.
description_fr:
Les nuits où les aurores sont visibles, il lève les yeux vers le ciel pour hululer une douce mélodie.
Toutefois, ce chant le rend vulnérable face aux ennemis.

name: Beakon
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.
description:
Some think it is a related species to,
but there is in fact no connection.
Using its sharp beak, it descends on its prey in a quick motion
that resembles a bolt of lightning.
description_fr:
Semble être étroitement lié à sans que ce ne soit le cas.
Attaque ses ennemis en piqué à l'aide de son bec pointu, telle la foudre s'abattant sur sa cible.

name: Beakon Cryst
description:
Perfectly adapted to colder environments,
it hardly feels the cold despite its slender form.
Its diving plunge carries tremendous force,
as if a giant icicle were dropping straight from the sky.
description_fr:
Résistant aux régions froides, il supporte le gel malgré sa silhouette élancée.
La puissance de son attaque en piqué est redoutable:
on dirait la chute d’un gigantesque pic de glace.

name: Ghangler
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden to travel quickly across water.
While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.
description:
With its shining lure, it illuminates the darkness.
The wandering Pals drawn in by the light stand no chance of escape
once spotted by.
No matter how far, it will keep guiding them until they get home
safe and sound.
description_fr:
Un leurre lumineux qui perce les ténèbres.
Les Pals égarés, attirés par sa lueur, n’ont plus aucune chance de lui échapper...
Car les guidera sans relâche, jusqu’à ce qu’ils retrouvent enfin le chemin de leur foyer.

name: Ghangler Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden to travel quickly across water.
While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.
description:
Its blazing lure doubles as a grill for roasting prey.
Drawn in by the delicious aroma, Pals have no hope of escape once
 sets its sights on them.
In the end, they’re treated to a hearty meal—until everyone’s full.
description_fr:
Son leurre incandescent ne sert pas qu’à attirer les proies, mais aussi à cuire de savoureux mets.
Les Pals, attirés par l’odeur alléchante, ne peuvent plus s’échapper une fois repérés par...
car ils seront chaleureusement invités à partager un bon repas.

name: Rayhound
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can double jump while mounted.
description:
At full speed, it could be mistaken for a bolt of lightning.
When two s collide, a thunderous roar echoes through the air.
description_fr:
Devient littéralement un éclair lancé à pleine vitesse.
Lorsque deux entrent en collision, un rugissement semblable au tonnerre retentit.

name: Rayhound Cryst
description:
Sprinting across the tundra at full speed kicks up a blinding blizzard,
leading to constant collisions due to zero visibility.
description_fr:
Lorsqu’il sprinte à pleine vitesse dans les plaines enneigées, il soulève un véritable blizzard.
La visibilité devient si mauvaise que les entrent fréquemment en collision.

name: Menasting
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, increases the player's defense
and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
Being made of pure energy, its insides are completely hollow.
This Pal crams still-living prey into its hollow body, where it absorbs them.
Hellish screams of pain can often be heard coming from inside this Pal.
description_fr:
Son corps composé d'énergie est une coquille vide.
Il pousse sa proie dans sa carapace pour l'absorber encore vivante.
Des gémissements résonnent en continu autour de lui.

name: Menasting Terra
partner_skill_desc:
While fighting together, increases the player's defense
and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.
description:
Being made of pure energy, its insides are completely hollow.
It stuffs earth and minerals into its outer shell, achieving overwhelming mass.
Those who are struck by it can only let out hellish groans.
description_fr:
Son corps est une entité d’énergie dont l’intérieur est entièrement vide.
Il remplit sa carapace de terre et de minéraux afin d’atteindre une masse écrasante.
Ceux qui sont frappés par lui ne peuvent qu’émettre des gémissements dignes de l’enfer.

name: Needoll
description:
Its spikes react to its emotions.
A dearly cherished is something one may instinctively want to embrace.
But more often than not, it ends in a tragic accident.
description_fr:
Les épines de s’allongent ou se rétractent selon l’intensité de ses émotions.
Ne succombez pas à l'envie de le serrer dans vos bras.
Certains ont essayé, ils ont eu des problèmes...

name: Needoll Noct
description:
Its spikes react to its emotions.
A well-loved clings to its owner,
but accepting that love means accepting the pain too.
description_fr:
Les épines de s’allongent ou se rétractent selon l’intensité de ses émotions.
Plein d’affection pour son Paldresseur, il cherche souvent à se blottir contre lui...
Mais accepter son amour signifie aussi accepter la douleur qui l’accompagne.

name: Reindrix
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.
description:
Its transparent cerulean antlers glow with the cold of absolute zero.
Any who touch them with their bare hands are instantly frozen
and smashed to pieces.
description_fr:
Ses bois bleu transparent reflètent le zéro absolu.
Quiconque les touche à mains nues verra son corps se figer instantanément avant que sa vie ne se brise en morceaux.

name: Mossanda
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.
description:
A Pal so powerful it's hard to believe.
In one experiment, this Pal tore through 3,000 sheets of paper at once!
It's only by some miracle that this Pal isn't a meat-eater.
description_fr:
Sa force est incommensurable. Il aurait déchiré sans mal une liasse de 3 000 feuilles dans le cadre d'une expérience.
Heureusement qu'il n'est pas carnivore.

name: Mossanda Lux
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.
description:
A Pal whose power is truly shocking.
By altering the electrical currents in its body,
this Pal's been able to overload its own strength.
When it comes to sheer power, this Pal may be top of the list.
description_fr:
Sa force est incommensurable. Il transcende les limites de ses capacités physiques en convertissant l'électricité en signal.
Son nom revient systématiquement lorsque l'on évoque l'être le plus puissant.

name: Chillet
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Changes the player's attack type to Dragon while mounted.
description:
It can curl up its body and roll around at extremely high speeds.
Long ago, people would tie bags of milk to domesticated
 as they grazed to produce butter
using this spinning force.
description_fr:
Peut se mettre en boule et tourbillonner à une vitesse folle.
Autrefois, les gens domestiquaient des pour les faire tourner au milieu du lait et ainsi produire leur propre beurre.

name: Chillet Ignis
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.
description:
It can curl up its body and roll around so fast that sparks fly.
Sparks also fly when it feels excited.
If you stroke it too much, this pal will get fired up, literally!
description_fr:
Peut se mettre en boule et tourbillonner à une vitesse folle.
Autrefois, les gens domestiquaient des pour les faire tourner au milieu du lait et ainsi produire leur propre beurre.

name: Ragnahawk
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.
Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.
description:
Some think it is a related species to, but there is in fact no connection.
It mainly eats rocks, and after many long years its
beak and head have hardened to accommodate this diet.
description_fr:
Cette espèce semble être étroitement apparentée à, alors que pas du tout.
Se nourrit principalement de rochers, si bien que son bec comme sa tête durcissent au fil des années.

name: Moldron
description:
In a healthy individual, the lava on its back flows smoothly.
However, a poor lifestyle will gradually worsen its circulation,
eventually causing a lava clog that results in a sudden, massive explosion.
description_fr:
Chez les individus en bonne santé, la lave qui s’écoule sur leur dos circule de façon fluide.
De mauvaises habitudes finissent par en perturber le flux, jusqu’à provoquer un véritable engorgement.
Dans les cas les plus graves, une explosion soudaine peut survenir.

name: Moldron Cryst
description:
In a healthy individual, the substance flowing along its back maintains a stable temperature.
However, if its heartbeat quickens, the temperature destabilizes,
eventually triggering vaporization or crystallization that results in a sudden,
abrupt death from shock.
description_fr:
Chez les individus en bonne santé, la température du fluide qui parcourt leur dos reste stable.
Lorsqu’ils s’emballent, cet équilibre se dérègle, provoquant vaporisation ou solidification.
Dans les cas les plus graves, cela peut entraîner une mort subite.

name: Palumba
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden. 
Runs faster over grass.
description:
Disrupts enemies’ rhythm with a signature dance.
In turf battles, the first to fall in sync with the other’s rhythm loses.
Courtship, boredom, battle—it all comes down to dance!
Now then, what could a dance aimed at a human possibly mean?
description_fr:
Grâce à sa danse unique, il perturbe le rythme de ses ennemis.
Lors des luttes pour le territoire, celui qui se laisse emporter par le rythme de l'autre perd.
La séduction, l'ennui, tout se résume à une danse!
Mais qu’en est-il de la danse destinée aux humains... quel sens lui donner?

name: Digtoise
partner_skill_desc:
When activated, performs Shell Spin,
follows the player while spinning, and mines ores efficiently.
description:
A possessing the strongest shell and the only drill capable of piercing it,
ponders the contradictions of the world in the popular children's tale, |'s Fable|.
description_fr:
Il existe un conte intitulé « La foreuse de ».
Il raconte l’histoire d’un possédant à la fois la carapace la plus résistante et la foreuse la plus perçante, qui réfléchit aux paradoxes du monde.

name: Broncherry
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
Its scent drastically changes before and after pairing.
It exudes a pleasing aroma after finding a partner,
which is called the |Fragrance of First Love.|
description_fr:
Son odeur corporelle change radicalement avant et après avoir trouvé un partenaire.
Celle qu’il dégage ensuite est particulièrement appréciée et est appelée « parfum du premier amour ».

name: Broncherry Aqua
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While in team, Broncherry Aqua helps carry supplies,
increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
description:
Its scent drastically changes before and after pairing.
It exudes a pleasing aroma before finding a partner,
which is called the |Perfume of Purity.|
description_fr:
Son odeur corporelle change radicalement avant et après avoir trouvé un partenaire.
Celle qu’il dégage avant cela est particulièrement appréciée et est appelée « parfum de pureté ».

name: Dumud
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil
when assigned to Ranch.
description:
When too relaxed, its reaction time drastically declines.
Even if it were sliced from head to tail,
it probably wouldn't even realize that it should be dead until the next morning.
description_fr:
Son temps de réaction chute lorsqu'il est trop détendu.
Même découpé de la tête au pied, il ne réaliserait probablement sa propre mort que le lendemain matin.

name: Dumud Gild
partner_skill_desc:
While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. 
Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, 
with a small chance to drop Gold Coin.
description:
Its body reflects light with astounding clarity.
Even more shocking, its reflexes are somehow even slower than.
description_fr:
Son corps possède une surface au pouvoir réfléchissant impressionnant.
Et pourtant, sa vitesse de réaction est encore plus lente... que celle de!

name: Braloha
partner_skill_desc:
Can be ridden.
While at a base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to Breeding Farm to produce eggs.
(Effect does not stack.)
description:
Its breath carries a miraculous, pollen-like substance
that pollinates any plant it touches.
